title: OCS/GCS qconf user set schema
description: Schema describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json -su / -Mu: an access list / department (user set) definition.

type.description: User set roles. A user set may be an access list and/or a department.

fshare.description: Functional share assigned to the department.

oticket.description: Override tickets assigned to the department.

entries.description: Member user names (or departmental group entries).
